'''''Star Wars Handbook''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series that serves as a reading companion for other comic book titles. Three ''Star Wars Handbook'' issues were published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] from [[1998]] to [[2000]].
